Interface IGeoDatasetSchemaEdit2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that change the geodata transformation of a GeoDataset.

[Guid("0A6A2FAA-047D-4792-8732-D766D496BECA")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeoDatasetSchemaEdit2 : IGeoDatasetSchemaEdit

Properties

CanAlterGeodataXform

Indicates if the geodata transformation of the dataset can be altered.

bool CanAlterGeodataXform { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanAlterSpatialReference 

bool CanAlterSpatialReference { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

AlterGeodataXform(IGeodataXform) 

void AlterGeodataXform(IGeodataXform xform)

Parameters

xform IGeodataXform

AlterResolution(double, double, double)

Alters the resolution of the dataset and rebuilds the spatial indexes.

void AlterResolution(double xyResolution, double zResolution, double mResolution)

Parameters

xyResolution double
zResolution double
mResolution double

AlterSpatialReference(ISpatialReference)
